## Is this a template bug or a content bug?

- [ ] **Template bug** — affects all forking users (e.g., render script throws, schema is wrong, mode flag broken). File here.
- [ ] **Content bug** — only affects my fork (e.g., my custom CSL doesn't render). Don't file here; that's your fork's issue.
